# Agnes AI Usage Analytics Dashboard

> Visualize Agnes AI usage from a single CSV export. The app runs entirely in the browser and shows cost, token, request, per-key, per-project, and trend analytics. Open source, bilingual, and privacy-first.

## Core Capabilities

- Upload one Agnes usage CSV
- Parse `Consumption Quantity` into input/output tokens
- Count only `Consumption Status=success`
- View `Overview`, `By Project`, `By Key`, and `Trends`
- Filter by model when multiple models exist
- Generate social share cards
- Process everything locally in the browser

- Current app version: `0.1.0`
- Default public domain fallback is still `https://deepseek-usage.xyz`
- External links are intentionally preserved during this migration pass
